World Premiere — March 21 & 22, 2026  ·  Unity Baptist Church  ·  Newnan, Georgia

Seasons
of Strength

One hundred voices. One community. One EF-4 tornado. What recovery actually sounds like when you let the people at the center tell the story.

Private preview — not for wide distribution
scroll

The Project

Four years of listening. Ninety minutes of performance.

In March 2021, an EF-4 tornado moved through Newnan, Georgia, and tore open the lives of thousands of people. In the weeks that followed, creator and director Gwendolyn Kuhlmann began driving down — not to document, but to listen.

Seasons of Strength is built from over one hundred recorded voices: tornado survivors, first responders, case workers, children, elders, and faith leaders — woven together with live chamber orchestra, contemporary dance, and projected imagery into a single ninety-minute performance experience.

It premiered at Unity Baptist Church on March 21 & 22, 2026, in partnership with musicians of the LaGrange Symphony Orchestra, Southern Arc Dance, and the Seasons of Strength Organization — a grassroots community effort that sprang up around the art to help make it happen. The City of Newnan issued a mayoral proclamation recognizing the work. The story reached 17.2 million people.

This page is shared privately. You are here because Gwendolyn wanted you to see the work.

All photos by Jermon Clark, Focal Point Creative Services

What's Next

Seasons of Strength premiered in Newnan, Georgia, to an audience full of survivors, first responders, and community leaders and volunteers who saw their story reflected back to them. The response was clear: this story is healing, and it belongs in more places.

We're actively pitching the work to presenting institutions, festivals, and organizations working at the intersection of arts and community resilience. That pitch takes time, relationships, and materials — a proper clip reel, outreach, and the sustained creative leadership to see it through.

If this work moved you, consider contributing to what comes next. Your donation supports the artist and collaborators doing the work of bringing Seasons of Strength to new communities.

Support the Work →

Seasons of Strength is a fiscal agent of Caring Communities Foundation, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible.
